ns0:entry.ns0:title: Coding-Solo/godot-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Coding-Solo/godot-mcp
Language: javascript
MCP server for interfacing with Godot game engine. Provides tools for launching the editor, running projects, and capturing debug output.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EvoMap/evolver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EvoMap/evolver
Language: javascript
The GEP-powered self-evolving engine for AI agents. Auditable evolution with Genes, Capsules, and Events. | evomap.ai

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GitSquared/edex-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GitSquared/edex-ui
Language: javascript
A cross-platform, customizable science fiction terminal emulator with advanced monitoring & touchscreen support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenWhispr/openwhispr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenWhispr/openwhispr
Language: javascript
Voice-to-text dictation app with local (Nvidia Parakeet/Whisper) and cloud models (BYOK). Privacy-first and available cross-platform.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: affaan-m/ECC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC
Language: javascript
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: betaflight/betaflight-configurator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/betaflight/betaflight-configurator
Language: javascript
Cross platform configuration and management application for the Betaflight firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earthtojake/text-to-cad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earthtojake/text-to-cad
Language: javascript
A collection of agent skills for CAD, robotics and hardware design

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eslint/eslint
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eslint/eslint
Language: javascript
Find and fix problems in your JavaScript code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evidence-dev/evidence
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evidence-dev/evidence
Language: javascript
Business intelligence as code: build fast, interactive data visualizations in SQL and markdown

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huangxd-/danmu_api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huangxd-/danmu_api
Language: javascript
一个人人都能部署的基于 js 的弹幕 API 服务器，支持爱优腾芒哔咪人韩巴狐乐西埋帆弹幕直接获取，兼容弹弹play的搜索、详情查询和弹幕获取接口规范，并提供日志记录，支持vercel/netlify/edgeone/cloudflare/docker/hf等部署方式，不用提前下载弹幕，没有nas或小鸡也能一键部署。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jgraph/drawio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jgraph/drawio
Language: javascript
draw.io is a JavaScript, client-side editor for general diagramming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: outsourc-e/hermes-workspace
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/outsourc-e/hermes-workspace
Language: javascript
Native web workspace for Hermes Agent — chat, terminal, memory, skills, inspector.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: santifer/career-ops
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/santifer/career-ops
Language: javascript
Open-source AI job search: scan job portals, score listings A-F, tailor your CV, track applications — runs locally in your AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode…)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tradesdontlie/tradingview-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tradesdontlie/tradingview-mcp
Language: javascript
AI-assisted TradingView chart analysis — connect Claude Code to your TradingView Desktop for personal workflow automation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xuanyustudio/LocalMiniDrama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xuanyustudio/LocalMiniDrama
Language: javascript
🎬 seedance2接入 开源本地 AI 短剧 & 漫剧生成工具 —— 从故事到成片一站式完成，数据不出本机，短剧工作流管理平台，高灵活度，AI真人剧，AI漫剧本地搞定。 Open-source local AI short drama maker: story → storyboard → video, fully offline, your data stays yours. 纳米流水线
